layout.onRender: $count($all('config', 'dj-function', {'ID': 'dj-copilot'})) = 0 ? $notify('Please configure an AIApp function called dj-copilot in order to use the suggest feature')

properties.Suggest: selected.($comment := $parseJson($call('dj-copilot', {'response_format': { 'properties': {'res': {}} }, 'messages':[{'role':'user', 'content':'Create a very short description for this query called ' & ID & ': ' & query}]}).choices.message.content).res; $setIfAbsent('config', 'dj-query-catalog', ID, {'comment': $comment}); $refresh())

selected.($comment := $parseJson($call('dj-copilot', {'response_format': { 'properties': {'res': {}} }, 'messages':[{'role':'user', 'content':'Create a very short description for this ETL called ' & ID & ' that loads data into the table ' & table & ': ' & foreach & '
' & expression }]}).choices.message.content).res; $setIfAbsent('config', 'dj-function', ID, {'comment': $comment}); $refresh())

selected.($comment := $parseJson($call('dj-copilot', {'response_format': { 'properties': {'res': {}} }, 'messages':[{'role':'user', 'content':'Create a very short description for this function called ' & ID & ': ' & expression }]}).choices.message.content).res; $setIfAbsent('config', 'dj-function', ID, {'comment': $comment}); $refresh())
